mapper.delete: DELETE FROM work_calendar WHERE date BETWEEN CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(#{year}, '-12-31')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO work_calendar ( date, day_type, holiday, holiday_name, wage, after, target, confirmed, confirmed_by, confirmed_at, source, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.date}, CASE #{item.category} WHEN 'workday' THEN 0 WHEN 'weekend' THEN 1 WHEN 'legal' THEN 2 WHEN 'adjusted' THEN 3 WHEN 'makeup' THEN 0 ELSE 0 END, CASE #{item.category} WHEN 'legal' THEN 1 WHEN 'adjusted' THEN 1 WHEN 'weekend' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, #{item.name}, CASE #{item.category} WHEN 'legal' THEN 3 WHEN 'adjusted' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, CASE #{item.category} WHEN 'makeup' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END, NULL, 1, #{item.confirmedBy}, NOW(), 'manual', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, date, day_type FROM work_calendar WHERE date BETWEEN CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(#{year}, '-12-31')
